title: google-research/timesfm
friendlyTitle: Google’s TimesFM helps forecast time-based data
summary: TimesFM is Google Research’s pretrained foundation model for time-series forecasting, with recent packaging and example updates and integrations across Google products such as BigQuery ML and Sheets workflows.
friendlySummary: TimesFM is an open Google Research model for predicting future values from time-series data, like sales, traffic, or sensor readings.
whyItMatters: Developers and analysts can use it to forecast demand, metrics, inventory, finance, operations, or sensor data without training a custom model from scratch. It is especially relevant for teams adding forecasting to dashboards, agents, or data pipelines.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it when you need forecasts without building a forecasting model from zero.
